Dr. Rongdian Fu

personal site

Ph.D. in Molecular Biology from the University of Calgary, 1996.

Joined the Molecular Sciences Institute in July 1996.

Current research is focused on sequencing analysis of selected Fugu genome regions containing members of the following multigene families:Ê the creatine kinase gene family, the enolase gene family, and the aldolase gene family.Ê Members of these multigene families each have their unique expression patterns.Ê Sequencing of these gene regions and analysis of their expression patterns will not only reveal how these gene families were evolved, but also facilitate the discovery of specific regulatory elements through comparative analysis of genes with same expression patterns.
